summary: Dashboard access is guarded by client-side AuthContext state.

steps.read_auth_state: Dashboard reads loading, logout, and user from useAuth.
steps.redirect_unauthenticated: When loading is false and user is null, Dashboard replaces the route with /signin.
steps.render_authenticated_shell: When auth loading has completed, Dashboard greets the current user by name when available.
steps.sign_out: The sign-out button calls logout and then pushes /signin.

conditions: Redirect waits for loading to be false so initial auth refresh can complete.
Dashboard page content must not become a source of privileged data unless server-side or API authorization is added.
